_comment: EXACT mcpServers entry to ADD to /Volumes/T7/Projects/helix_code/.mcp.json under the existing "mcpServers" object, as a sibling key to "codegraph", "media-validator", "open-design". Per §11.4.166 (semgrep mandate) + §11.4.78 step-3 MCP-wiring pattern. Do NOT replace the file — insert this key only. The onboarding agent does NOT edit .mcp.json (meta-git race avoidance); the conductor applies it.

semgrep.description: Semgrep static-analysis MCP server (§11.4.166). Local AST/scan/findings over the workspace; uses Community registry rules when SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN is absent (Pro/app tier honestly skipped per §11.4.3).
